description_long: This is a military combat tactical vehicle resembling a tracked tank, featuring a robust armored hull and a rotating turret mounted centrally on the chassis. The vehicle is equipped with a prominent main cannon extending from the turret, as well as additional secondary armaments such as a coaxial machine gun and side-mounted equipment. The tracks are wide and reinforced, designed for traversing rough terrain, and the body is angular with sloped armor for deflection. The exterior is painted in a solid olive drab color with minimal markings, and the surface appears matte and non-reflective. The vehicle's design suggests heavy steel construction with visible hatches, periscopes, and exhausts, indicating crew access and operational functionality.
description: A heavily armored tracked combat vehicle with a central turret, main cannon, and olive drab finish, designed for military operations.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main cannon, coaxial gun, and thick frontal armor with wide tracks.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the turret, side-mounted equipment, and the full length of the tracks.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the turret, engine deck, and rear armor with exhaust details.
description_view_3: Right side view reveals the secondary armament, turret profile, and track system.
attribute_weapon_mounts: One main cannon mounted on the turret front, one coaxial machine gun on the turret, and one side-mounted secondary weapon on the right hull.
attribute_armor_plating: Full body armor plating with sloped and angular surfaces, thick frontal and turret armor, and reinforced side skirts.
attribute_camouflage_pattern: Solid olive drab paint scheme with no visible camouflage pattern.
attribute_military_markings: A small circular insignia on the turret side; no other visible markings.
